reason: SKILL contract requires acquire/heartbeat/release but no deterministic lock lifecycle owner exists; a new component and route are required.

proposed_node.title: system plan lock lifecycle managerをbuildする
proposed_node.acceptance_criterion: repository_id/run_id/session_owner/feature identityを束縛したrepo-local lockをatomic acquire・heartbeat renew・owner限定releaseし、expired lockを監査付きcleanupする。matching lockの競合、owner不一致、path escape、同一repo lock directory内のmalformed lockはfail-closedで拒否する
